title: The Future of Autonomous Driving: 7 Top Stocks to Buy for AI-Powered Vehicles
text: Autonomous driving and AI-powered vehicles are a growing trend in the automotive industry. The technology promises to improve safety, reduce traffic congestion, and allow humans to hand over driving responsibilities to robots.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy for the Future of Transportation
text: The recent eruption of geopolitical flashpoints and environmental anxieties forces a rethink regarding the future of transportation stocks. For instance, just the global electric vehicle market may reach a valuation in excess of $1.1 trillion by 2030.

title: Aptiv (APTV) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Aptiv's (APTV) fourth-quarter 2022 revenues surge year over year.

title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Aptiv PLC (APTV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.72% and 5.97%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 2, 2023 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Jessica Kourakos - Vice President, Investor Relations & Environmental, Social, & Governance Kevin Clark - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Joe Massaro - Chief Financial Officer & Senior Vice President of Business Operations Conference Call Participants Rod Lache - Wolfe Research Adam Jonas - Morgan Stanley John Murphy - Bank of America Emmanuel Rosner - Deutsche Bank Itay Michaeli - Citi Mark Delaney - Goldman Sachs Chris McNally - Evercore David Kelley - Jefferies James Picariello - BNP Paribas Operator Good day, and welcome to the Aptiv Q4 2022 Earnings Call. Today's conference is being recorded.

title: Aptiv Reports Fourth Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: Record 2022 Bookings and Revenue DUBLIN , Feb. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener and more connected, today reported fourth quarter 2022 U.S. GAAP earnings of $0.86 per diluted share. Excluding special items, fourth quarter earnings totaled $1.27 per diluted share.

title: Aptiv to Present at Citi's 2023 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference
text: DUBLIN , Feb. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener, and more connected, will present at Citi's 2023 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference, February 21 at 1:50 p.m. Eastern Time.

title: Aptiv to Present at the Wolfe Research Global Auto, Auto Tech, and Mobility Conference
text: DUBLIN , Feb. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener, and more connected, will present at the Wolfe Research Global Auto, Auto Tech, and Mobility Conference, February 15 at 10:35 a.m. Eastern Time.

title: Aptiv to Present at the Barclays Industrial Select Conference
text: DUBLIN , Feb. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener, and more connected, will present at the Barclays Industrial Select Conference, February 22 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
